name: Fettucini with Broccoli Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, combine the broccoli (flower part only), walnuts, small chunks of Parmesan, olive oil, and salt to make pesto.
2. In a large pan, sauté one crushed garlic clove in butter until fragrant.
3. Stir in lemon juice and cook for about 20 seconds more.
4. Add the cream to the pan and stir thoroughly.
5. Cook the fettuccine according to package instructions until al dente.
6. Drain the pasta and lightly toss with a pinch of parsley.
7. Add the broccoli pesto to taste, adjusting seasoning as needed.
8. Serve hot, garnished with extra grated Parmesan cheese.
